Triggered a decoupling probe for tech park office buildings and "Frontier Tech Stuffing." The Apple global electronics OEM template, forcibly embedded in the original data, has been destroyed at a physical level. The business license for the entity "Chuangwei Intelligent Technology" resembled a business plan from a top-tier Silicon Valley startup: it not only claimed to undertake "Artificial Intelligence theory and algorithm software development" but also to "manufacture wearable smart devices and intelligent instrumentation." The big data algorithms of the commercial and industrial registration system were directly triggered by these buzzwords, categorizing it under high-end "electronic device manufacturing." However, the forensic logic engine directly captured its exceptionally meager physical footprint: only 1 person insured! Paid-in capital of merely 1.04 million RMB. Subsequently, the spatial probe returned the decisive coordinates: "Room 506, Building 1, Chuangxinhui, No. 61 Wanjing Road, Jiangbei New Area." This is a typical single office unit within a software park/incubator. The logical deduction immediately shifted into a comedic mode: in a single office unit within an incubator, a sole proprietor with only 1 million RMB claims to be simultaneously conquering top-tier AI algorithms, establishing a wearable device production line, and manufacturing industrial instruments? This is not only a blatant disregard for common sense but also a sacrilege against technology. The probe ruthlessly stripped away all "AI development" and "manufacturing" halos, discovering its true modus vivendi within its license: "Sales Agent; Instrumentation Sales." The stark reality emerged: this is an authentic "1-Employee Tech Park Shell & Broker." The proprietor likely just rented an office or co-working space within the park, assisting others in selling instrumentation online, or acting as an agent for certain tech products. Its purported high-tech "manufacturing entity" label has been entirely and systematically obliterated.
